hero.title:
From SMT to shipment,
completed in one place
hero.subtitle: SMT, PCB assembly, final assembly, precision inspection, and packaging — Mirae SMT delivers an end-to-end manufacturing service. From low-volume prototypes to high-volume mass production.

hero.title:
Founded in 1993,
building on technology and trust
hero.subtitle: Since 1993, we have been a dedicated OEM/ODM manufacturing partner turning ideas into finished products.

ceo.title: Message from the CEO
ceo.name: Youngsoo Ha
ceo.message:
Welcome to Mirae SMT.

With the belief that "our customers' success is our success," we strive to be a true manufacturing partner — not just a contract supplier — growing alongside our clients. Through continuous investment in technology and quality, we aim to be recognized on the global stage.

mission.label: Mission
mission.text: To be a trusted manufacturing partner that supports our customers' success through uncompromising quality and reliable delivery.

vision.label: Vision
vision.text: To become Asia's leading integrated OEM/ODM manufacturing solutions provider.

items.text: Founded as Mirae Trading · Exclusive Korean distributor for Air Reflow Soldering
Guro factory established · EMS business launched
Renamed "Mirae SMT" · Relocated to Bucheon Technopark, Gyeonggi-do
Built 5 dedicated SMD / PBA lines for iRevo
Established Shenyang (China) subsidiary · 3 SMT lines for Suyoung Electronics
Built 2 SMT lines for Daewoong Electronics (Samsung LCD)
Operating 7 SMT lines · Equipment upgrade (JUKI → Hanwha)
Smart factory transformation — MES system deployed

hero.title: Every process, one location
hero.subtitle: Five core processes connected on a single automated line — for fast, consistent quality.

smt.name: SMT
smt.headline: Surface Mount Technology
smt.description: Hanwha and JUKI chip mounters with inline inspection handle 0201 to BGA placement with precision.

pcb.name: PCB Assembly
pcb.headline: PCB Assembly / DIP
pcb.description: Wave soldering combined with through-hole insertion lines — we handle the most complex board assemblies.

assembly.name: Assembly
assembly.headline: Final Product Assembly
assembly.description: Mechanical assembly, cable work, and cosmetic inspection — every step to a finished product.

qc.name: QC / Test
qc.headline: Quality Control & Test
qc.description: From 100% inspection to reliability testing — multi-stage validation prevents defect escape.

packaging.name: Packaging
packaging.headline: Packaging & Logistics
packaging.description: ESD-safe packaging to export container loading — we own the final mile.

process.title: Manufacturing Flow
process.subtitle: From your drawing to a finished shipment

hero.title: A modern smart factory
hero.subtitle: Real-time production monitored through state-of-the-art automation and MES.

items.name: Solder Paste Storage System
items.spec: Precise temperature control · Solder paste quality preservation

items.name: SPI Machine
items.spec: 3D solder paste inspection · Pre-placement quality control

items.name: Mirtec AOI Machine
items.spec: Automated optical inspection for placement defects

items.name: X-Ray Inspection
items.spec: BGA · QFN internal solder joint inspection

hero.title: Quality is our standard; trust is our promise to customers
hero.subtitle: We deliver the best products and services through rigorous quality management and continuous improvement.

steps.title: IQC
steps.text: Incoming inspection — appearance, specs, reliability sampling

steps.title: IPQC
steps.text: In-process inspection — SPC-based monitoring after each step

steps.title: OQC
steps.text: Outgoing inspection — appearance, function, package integrity

policy.title: Quality Policy
policy.text: We commit to exceeding — not merely meeting — our customers' expectations. Nonconformities are surfaced, not hidden, and addressed through systemic improvement to prevent recurrence.

hero.title: Quote & Manufacturing Inquiry
hero.subtitle: Share your drawings, specifications, and estimated quantities — we'll review and respond within 2 business days.

form.title: Online Inquiry
form.subtitle: Name, email, and message are required. All other fields are optional.
form.name: Name
form.attachmentHint: PDF, DWG, ZIP, PNG, JPG (max 10MB, optional)
form.messagePlaceholder: Product specs, component details, special requirements, etc.

form.errorMessage: Please try again later or email us directly.
